message_id.description: ID of message/comment to reply to

tools.name: social_post
tools.description: Post new content to a platform

tools.name: social_queue_add
tools.description: Add a response to the queue for review before sending

tools.name: social_stats
tools.description: Get social media statistics and engagement metrics

skills.name: autoresponder
skills.description: Automated social media responder using local AI + knowledge base from PDFs

tools.name: autoresponder_load_pdf
tools.description: Load a PDF into the knowledge base for generating responses

tools.name: autoresponder_load_text
tools.description: Add text content to the knowledge base

title.description: Title or identifier for this content

tools.name: autoresponder_kb_status
tools.description: Show knowledge base status and statistics

tools.name: autoresponder_kb_search
tools.description: Search the knowledge base for relevant information

tools.name: autoresponder_add_rule
tools.description: Add a response rule or guideline

rule.description: Rule to follow (e.g., 'Never discuss competitor products', 'Always include a call-to-action')

tools.name: autoresponder_list_rules
tools.description: List all response rules and guidelines

tools.name: autoresponder_generate
tools.description: Generate a response for a message using RAG + LLM

context.description: Additional context (platform, sender info, conversation history)

style_override.description: Override the default style for this response

tools.name: autoresponder_batch
tools.description: Process multiple messages and generate responses

messages.description: JSON array of messages: [{id, text, platform, sender}]

tools.name: autoresponder_feedback
tools.description: Provide feedback on a generated response to improve future responses

skills.name: websearch
skills.description: Search the web and fetch content from URLs

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web for information. Use this to answer questions about people, events, facts, or any topic requiring internet knowledge.

tools.name: fetch_url
tools.description: Fetch and extract text content from a URL

tools.name: wikipedia_search
tools.description: Search Wikipedia for information about a topic. Best for factual information about people, places, events, concepts.

skills.name: agimemory
skills.description: Persistent AI memory system with semantic search and identity persistence

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: Store a new memory. Use this to remember important information, facts, or events.

tools.name: memory_recall
tools.description: Recall memories related to a query. Use this to remember past information.

query.description: What to search for in memory

tools.name: memory_forget
tools.description: Forget a specific memory by ID

belief.description: The belief or preference to store

tools.name: goal_add
tools.description: Add a new goal or intention

tools.name: identity_info
tools.description: Get information about my identity and self

tools.name: conversation_log
tools.description: Log a conversation message for episodic memory

skills.name: agimemory_pg
skills.description: Advanced persistent AI memory with semantic search (PostgreSQL + pgvector)

tools.name: pg_memory_store
tools.description: Store a memory with semantic embedding for later retrieval

tools.name: pg_memory_search
tools.description: Semantic search for memories. Finds memories similar in meaning to the query.

tools.name: pg_memory_link
tools.description: Create a relationship between two memories

tools.name: pg_memory_graph
tools.description: Get memory graph/relationships for a memory

tools.name: pg_memory_consolidate
tools.description: Consolidate similar memories to reduce redundancy

tools.name: pg_memory_decay
tools.description: Apply memory decay to reduce importance of old unused memories

tools.name: pg_emotional_state
tools.description: Record or get current emotional state

value.description: Value to set (omit to get current value)

skills.name: p2p
skills.description: P2P distributed agents: discover peers, share skills, distribute tasks

tools.name: discover_peers
tools.description: Scan for R CLI peers on the local network using mDNS

tools.name: add_peer
tools.description: Manually add a peer by hostname/IP address

tools.name: list_peers
tools.description: List known peers and their status

tools.name: approve_peer
tools.description: Approve a pending peer for trusted communication

peer_id.description: ID of the peer to approve
ID of the peer to reject

tools.name: peer_status
tools.description: Get detailed status of a specific peer

tools.name: remote_task
tools.description: Execute a task on a remote peer

agent.description: Specific agent to use on the peer

tools.name: remote_skill
tools.description: Invoke a skill/tool on a remote peer

tool.description: Name of the tool within the skill

tools.name: find_skill
tools.description: Find peers that have a specific skill

skill_name.description: Name of the skill to find

peer_id.description: Peer to sync with (all if omitted)

tools.name: share_document
tools.description: Share a document with specific peers

peer_ids.description: IDs of peers to share with (all if omitted)

tools.name: p2p_status
tools.description: Get P2P system status and statistics

skills.name: distributed_ai
skills.description: Distributed AI inference across multiple Apple Silicon Macs using MLX

tools.name: cluster_status
tools.description: Get the status of the distributed AI cluster including nodes, memory, and loaded model

tools.name: add_node
tools.description: Add a remote node to the distributed cluster

tools.name: remove_node
tools.description: Remove a node from the cluster

node_id.description: ID of the node to remove

tools.name: list_nodes
tools.description: List all nodes in the cluster with their capabilities

tools.name: check_model
tools.description: Check if the cluster has enough resources to run a model

tools.name: load_model
tools.description: Load a model distributed across the cluster nodes

model_name.description: HuggingFace model name or local path

tools.name: unload_model
tools.description: Unload the currently loaded model to free memory

tools.name: generate
tools.description: Generate text using distributed inference across the cluster

tools.name: assign_layers
tools.description: View or manually reassign model layers to nodes

reassign.description: Whether to reassign layers based on current node availability

tools.name: sync_p2p
tools.description: Sync cluster nodes from approved P2P peers
